ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
Cleopatra is a matplotlib utility package for visualizing 2D/3D numpy arrays,
unstructured meshes, and statistical histograms. It targets scientific and
research users working with geospatial and raster data.
about.summary: matplotlib utility package for visualizing arrays, unstructured meshes, and statistical histograms

about.description:
Cleopatra is a matplotlib utility package for visualizing 2D/3D numpy arrays,
unstructured meshes, and statistical histograms. It targets scientific and
research users working with geospatial and raster data.
about.summary: matplotlib utility package for visualizing arrays, unstructured meshes, and statistical histograms

name: cleopatra
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set python_min = "3.11" %}
{% set name = "cleopatra" %}
{% set version = "0.7.1" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/serapeum-org/cleopatra/archive/{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: da413fb5723183258eb764dff15748b6c8cb11e8c1546b2a437afade1d89ba8f

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - hatchling
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - numpy >=2.0.0
    - hpc >=0.1.4
    - matplotlib >=3.8.4
    - ffmpeg-python

test:
  requires:
    - python {{ python_min }}
  imports:
    - cleopatra

about:
  home: https://github.com/serapeum-org/cleopatra
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  license_family: GPL
  license_file: LICENSE.md
  summary: matplotlib utility package for visualizing arrays, unstructured meshes, and statistical histograms
  description: |
    Cleopatra is a matplotlib utility package for visualizing 2D/3D numpy arrays,
    unstructured meshes, and statistical histograms. It targets scientific and
    research users working with geospatial and raster data.
  dev_url: https://github.com/serapeum-org/cleopatra
  doc_url: https://serapeum-org.github.io/cleopatra/latest/
  doc_source_url: https://github.com/serapeum-org/cleopatra/main/README.md

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - MAfarrag
